headline: Freeport-McMoRan vs Newmont: Which Crushed Mining Giant Looks Like the Cleaner Bet?
summary: Freeport-McMoRan (NYSE: FCX) and Newmont (NYSE: NEM) both beat earnings in their most recent quarters, yet both stocks have been hit hard. The former is down 16.7% over the past month, while the latter has fallen 18.8%. The selloff raises a real question for commodity investors: which is better positioned to recover? A Mud Rush ... Freeport-McMoRan vs Newmont: Which Crushed Mining Giant Looks Like the Cleaner Bet?

headline: Newmont’s Partner Discoveries Add Long Term Optionality To Valuation Story
summary: Newmont's joint venture partner Irving Resources reported high grade gold and silver assays from the Shika prospect at the Noto project in Japan. Gold Terra announced positive drilling results at the Yellorex zone on the Con Mine Option property in Canada, held under an option agreement with a Newmont subsidiary. These updates highlight exploration progress in projects where Newmont participates through partnerships rather than direct operatorship. Newmont (NYSE:NEM) is drawing attention...

headline: Gold rebounds, but silver extends losses as oscillating oil prices spark market volatility
summary: The metals saw bumpy trade on Friday morning, after joining a broad sell-off the previous day.
